input: Create a Github Actions pipeline that deploys a simple HTML file with one button to Github Pages
expected_output:
name: Deploy HTML to Github Pages
on: [push]
jobs:
  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v2
      - name: Deploy
        uses: peaceiris/actions-gh-pages@v3
        with:
          github_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          publish_dir: ./
